name: 粘性炸弹爆炸
description: 粘性炸弹爆炸，对周围敌人造成伤害
code: function executeSkill(context) { if (!context.battle.stickyBombs || context.battle.stickyBombs.length === 0) return { success: false }; var triggered = false; var messages = []; for (var i = context.battle.stickyBombs.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) { var bomb = context.battle.stickyBombs[i]; if (context.playerId === bomb.ownerPlayerId) continue; bomb.opponentEndTurnsSeen = (bomb.opponentEndTurnsSeen || 0) + 1; if (bomb.opponentEndTurnsSeen < 1) continue; var targetX = bomb.x; var targetY = bomb.y; if (bomb.attachedPieceId) { var attachedPiece = context.battle.pieces.find(function(p) { return p.instanceId === bomb.attachedPieceId && p.currentHp > 0; }); if (attachedPiece) { targetX = attachedPiece.x; targetY = attachedPiece.y; } } var affected = context.battle.pieces.filter(function(p) { return p.currentHp > 0 && Math.abs(p.x - targetX) + Math.abs(p.y - targetY) <= 1; }); var hitNames = []; for (var j = 0; j < affected.length; j++) { var target = affected[j]; var dmg = Math.max(0, bomb.damage - (target.defense || 0)); target.currentHp = Math.max(0, target.currentHp - dmg); hitNames.push(target.name + '(-' + dmg + ')'); } messages.push('粘性炸弹爆炸！' + (hitNames.length > 0 ? hitNames.join('、') : '未命中任何棋子')); context.battle.stickyBombs.splice(i, 1); triggered = true; } return triggered ? { success: true, message: messages.join('，') } : { success: false }; }
